description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages development, test, preprod, and production using the specified Emacs Docker images. In the development stage add a development job that runs on all branches except master, uses the image psachin/emacs-publish:emacs-29.0.50, and executes emacs --batch --no-init-file --load publish.el --funcall org-publish-all. In the test stage add a test job that uses the iquiw/alpine-emacs image and runs the same Emacs publish command. In the preprod stage add a preprod job that uses the image psachin/emacs-publish:30.0.50 and runs the same command. In the production stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, is manual, uses the image psachin/emacs-publish:30.0.50, runs the same command, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and deploys to the GitLab Pages URL https://psachin.gitlab.io/.
